request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that investing in civil defense preparedness actually strengthens our national security while protecting our liberties? Unlike expensive military interventions, this practical approach ensures we're ready for any threat without compromising our values. Countries with robust civil defense programs report higher public safety and lower military spending. It's time we prioritize smart, effective security measures that keep all Americans safe. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
